title: Breaking the mould: Rethinking the age-old structure of Indian law firms
description: During a recent hearing before the Supreme Court, Senior Advocate Indira Jaising raised a pointed question about the scope of the term “industry,” using the legal profession as an example. She asked the Bench whether non-lawyer personnel such as clerks, stenographers and other support staff working in courts and law firms can be excluded from this definition.In response, Justice BV Nagarathna noted that the original basis for such an exclusion dated back to the 1970s, when legal practice in Indi
